_comment: Hand-curated FIXTURE_OPS method extensions for VeSyncIntegrationVirtual.groovy.
Each entry lists driver-side methods that are NOT documented in pyvesync's vendored
tests/api/.../<fixture>.yaml — typically v2.3+ command additions to this fork's drivers
that pyvesync's upstream test fixtures haven't been updated to cover.
The regenerator at tools/regenerate_virtual_parent.py merges these into the
auto-generated FIXTURE_OPS @Field block, deduping by method name (extensions take
When a pyvesync upstream PR adds these methods to the canonical fixture YAML,
remove the corresponding extension entry here; the next regenerator run will
replace it with the canonical pyvesync source.

LTF-F422S._comment: pyvesync vendored LTF-F422S.yaml omits setTowerFanMode and setDisplay — only setLevel, setSwitch, setMuteSwitch, setOscillationSwitch, getTowerFanStatus are present. Mode-set and display commands are driver-side additions.

LPF-R423S._comment: pyvesync vendored LPF-R423S.yaml omits setFanMode and setDisplay — only setLevel, setSwitch, setOscillationStatus, getFanStatus are present. Mode-set and display commands are driver-side additions.

LEH-B381S._comment: pyvesync vendored LEH-B381S.yaml omits setLightStatus — the SproutNightlight nightlight command is a driver-side v2.x addition (LevoitSproutHumidifier.setNightlight sends {brightness, colorTemperature, nightLightSwitch}). Not in pyvesync's canonical LEH-B381S fixture.

LUH-O451S-WEU._comment: EU/RGB variant. pyvesync vendored fixture (no LUH-O451S-WEU.yaml upstream; based on PR #502, OPEN) omits setLightStatus — the RGB nightlight command is a driver-side v2.x addition (LevoitOasisMist450S.setNightlightSwitch/setColor send {action, brightness, red, green, blue, colorMode, speed, colorSliderLocation}). RGB hardware is LUH-O451S-WEU only; runtime-gated on state.deviceType in the driver.
